name: create-user-stories
description: Turn a product brief into a small set of user stories with INVEST-style acceptance criteria.
body:
# create-user-stories

This skill helps decompose a product brief into 3-7 user stories with acceptance criteria.

## When to use

When the user is starting a new feature and only has a high-level brief or a single sentence; they want to land on a tractable set of stories before architecture or code.

## How it works

1. Read the brief from the conversation context (do NOT fetch external systems).
2. Identify the primary user, secondary user(s), and the value being delivered.
3. Emit 3-7 stories in the form `As a <user>, I want <capability>, so that <outcome>`.
4. For each story, attach 2-4 acceptance criteria in Given/When/Then form.

## Output

Markdown with one heading per story and a nested list of acceptance criteria.
